main_direction: Hold source_policy_hybrid_ring_regularization / stablelead_nearest_plus_uniform_tail as the current local lead, keep research in steady_hold + IDLE_GUARD, keep no auto-next ticket, and keep cloud off because the camera sub-object counterbalance axis is exhausted and any later move now requires a fresh higher-level manual problem plus a separate explicit downstream decision.
current_cloud_blocker: camera_objective_coupling_rebalancing closed as dead_same_day at short_gate_10x5 while the promoted hybrid-ring local lead remained current, so cloud must remain off. Any later forward move now requires a fresh higher-level manual problem and a separate explicit downstream decision.

gate_references.stable_lead_reference_note: The canonical stable-lead reference now comes from the manually promoted hybrid-ring candidate logs, because that config remains the current local lead.

why_lead: It beat the previous stable lead at the short 10/5 gate on camera, conf_depth, and reg_depth while keeping translation flat.
It also beat the previous stable lead again at the long 100/20 gate and therefore earned a formal provisional_lead before manual promotion.
Later residual-case, focal-isolation, translation-isolation, and FL/T coupling tickets all failed to dislodge it as the current local lead.

next_local_diagnostic.name: fresh_higher_level_manual_problem_only_if_later_needed
next_local_diagnostic.goal: Do not auto-open another ticket. Only define a fresh higher-level manual problem later if another genuinely new question is needed.

non_goals: Do not arm or run another ticket tonight.
Do not reopen focal-only, translation-only, or FL/T coupling cousins.
Do not auto-promote to cloud or auto-generate the next question.

nightly_modes.name: steady_hold
nightly_modes.when: The promoted local lead is synced and there is no active approved problem.
steps: Run preflight and consistency as guard-only cleanliness checks.
Keep current_lead_config on the promoted local lead.
Do not open a candidate automatically.

nightly_modes.name: single_candidate_local_gate
nightly_modes.when: A later fresh higher-level manual problem explicitly authorizes one new local candidate.
steps: Do not branch into cousin sweeps or a second same-night candidate.

promotion_requirements_before_cloud_cons: Keep cloud off after local promotion; a separate explicit downstream decision is still required.
Do not treat local promotion as implicit cloud authorization.

latest_rejected_candidate.reason: The single FL/T coupling candidate still failed the short gate: camera improved only marginally, while T, conf_depth, and reg_depth did not improve.
